meaning: adj.涓嶉厤鍚堢殑,涓嶇瓑鍚岀殑
examples: In this paper, the writer has found out the forms of incoordinate actions and pointed out how to prevent the incoordinate actions on the basis of collision accidents analyses.
With oil fields development, oil-gas gathering and transferring is incoordinate with crude production, which causes the energy consumption cost of system to increase year by year.
